title: Santa Barbara — Fire Response Gaps
description: Emergency-response decision tool: a gap-priority filter (coverage × very-high fire × flood) narrows the map to the zones that matter, plus coverage breakdown, distributions, and 5 suggested new fire-station sites ranked by zones served.
author: makella
remix_prompt: Remix https://makella.github.io/felt-app-gallery/apps/santa-barbara-fire-gaps/ — bake a weighted priority score onto the zones (needs a felt-python data step) so sliders can recolor them live.

title: Baltimore Real Estate
description: Listings explorer with price/beds histograms, zoning breakdown, and click-to-detail across a styled Baltimore map.
author: makella
remix_prompt: Remix https://makella.github.io/felt-app-gallery/apps/baltimore-real-estate/ — add a ranked list of the 10 most expensive listings.

title: Global Earthquakes — USGS M4.5+
description: Seismic monitor: magnitude histogram, depth stats, time filtering, and click-to-detail on recent global earthquakes.
author: makella
remix_prompt: Remix https://makella.github.io/felt-app-gallery/apps/global-earthquakes/ — make it an ops dashboard for a monitoring team.

title: Baltimore Listings — Color By
description: Live-restyle behavior: buttons recolor the map by price, sq ft, beds, or Zestimate via setLayerStyle. Demonstrates a map-driving behavior, not just a sidebar.
author: makella
remix_prompt: Remix https://makella.github.io/felt-app-gallery/apps/baltimore-color-by/ — turn the metric buttons into weight sliders that combine into one composite score.

title: Transit-Oriented Development Trends
description: TOD explorer pairing transit access with development metrics, with category breakdowns and feature detail.
author: makella
remix_prompt: Remix https://makella.github.io/felt-app-gallery/apps/transit-oriented-development/ — add sliders that re-weight a suitability score and recolor the map.
